basic_details.job_title: ICAR-IARI Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Agricultural Research Institute (ICAR-IARI) Research Associate (RA) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of ICAR-IARI. A total of 1 Research Associate (RA) vacancy has been announced through the ICAR-IARI Research Associate (RA) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Max: 40 years for Men, 45 years for Women (relaxation as per ICAR Norms)
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 40 years for Men, 45 years for Women. Age relaxation is applicable as per ICAR Norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D in Economics / Agri. Economics/ Statistics or Master's degree in Economics/ Agri. Economics/ Statistics with 3/4/5 years of Bachelor's degree {with first division or 60% marks or equivalent overall GPA with at least three (3) years' experience preferably in Research/Statistical Data Analysis/Statistical Tools/ Technology Commercialization/ Business development etc as evidenced from Fellowship/Associateship/ Training/ other engagements as circulated vide F.No. 2-9/2012-HRD dated 25.04.2014 and One research paper in Science Citation Index (SCI)/NAAS rated (>_4.0) Journal as per Om SR/S9/Z-09/2018 of DST dated 30.01.2019.
qualification.details: Ph.D in Economics / Agri. Economics/ Statistics OR Master's degree in Economics/ Agri. Economics/ Statistics with 3/4/5 years of Bachelor's degree {with first division or 60% marks or equivalent overall GPA with at least three (3) years' experience preferably in Research/Statistical Data Analysis/Statistical Tools/ Technology Commercialization/ Business development etc as evidenced from Fellowship/Associateship/ Training/ other engagements as circulated vide F.No. 2-9/2012-HRD dated 25.04.2014 AND One research paper in Science Citation Index (SCI)/NAAS rated (>_4.0) Journal as per Om SR/S9/Z-09/2018 of DST dated 30.01.2019.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs.61,000/- HRA for Master's degree & Rs. 67,000+ HRA for PhDs
salary_details.details: Research Associate-(RA): Rs.61,000/- HRA for Master's degree Research Associate-(RA): Rs. 67,000+ HRA for PhDs

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ICAR-IARI Research Associate-(RA) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 05-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: ICAR-IARI Research Associate-(RA) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ICAR-IARI Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ICAR-IARI Research Associate-(RA) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Ph.D in Economics / Agri. Economics/ Statistics OR Master's degree in Economics/ Agri. Economics/ Statistics with 3/4/5 years of Bachelor's degree {with first division or 60% marks or equivalent overall GPA with at least three (3) years' experience preferably in Research/Statistical Data Analysis/Statistical Tools/ Technology Commercialization/ Business development etc as evidenced from Fellowship/Associateship/ Training/ other engagements as circulated vide F.No. 2-9/2012-HRD dated 25.04.2014 AND One research paper in Science Citation Index (SCI)/NAAS rated (>_4.0) Journal as per Om SR/S9/Z-09/2018 of DST dated 30.01.2019.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 40 years for Men, 45 years for Women. Age relaxation is applicable as per ICAR Norms.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for ICAR-IARI Research Associate-(RA) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 05-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: ICAR-IARI Research Associate-(RA) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICAR-IARI Research Associate-(RA) position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 05 August 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Ph.D. in Economics/Agri. Economics/Statistics or a Master's degree with specific Bachelor's degree requirements and relevant experience, along with a published research paper.

faq.question: Q3. How will candidates be selected for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on educational qualifications, relevant experience, and an interview.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 61,000/- HRA for Master's degree holders and Rs. 67,000+ HRA for PhD holders.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for male and female candidates?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 40 years for men and 45 years for women, with relaxation as per ICAR norms.

faq.question: Q7. How should candidates submit their applications?
faq.answer: Applications should be submitted via email to the specified address, along with all required documents and a scanned copy of the application form.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the Indian Agricultural Research Institute (ICAR-IARI) located?
faq.answer: ICAR-IARI is located in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110 012.

faq.question: Q9. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This is a project-based job opportunity at ICAR-IARI.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any specific experience requirements for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates with a Master's degree need at least three years of experience in research, statistical data analysis, or related fields.
